summary: E-commerce app for 3D printed products (Creative Prints and Design) with a customer-facing storefront and a secure admin panel. Customers can browse products and place orders. Admin access is restricted to lanepeevy@gmail.com via Internet Identity login.
architectural_notes: Admin access is email-based, restricted to lanepeevy@gmail.com, authenticated via Internet Identity login

existing_features.title: Implement a customer-facing store page that displays all 3D printed products with product images, names, descriptions, and prices fetched from the backend.
Allow customers to place orders through the site by adding products to a cart and completing a checkout flow that captures customer details and submits a store order to the backend.

Restrict admin panel access exclusively to the Internet Identity principal associated with lanepeevy@gmail.com. The backend must verify admin identity on all admin operations and the frontend must only render the admin panel when the authenticated user is recognized as admin.

Build an admin dashboard with tabs for Products management and Orders management. The Products tab must allow the admin to add, edit, and delete 3D printed products (with image upload, name, description, price). The Orders tab must display all customer orders with status, customer details, and the ability to update order status.

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin panel for managing 3D printed products and viewing/managing orders, accessible only to lanepeevy@gmail.com via Internet Identity
Customer-facing storefront showing product images, prices, and descriptions for 3D printed products
Order placement functionality allowing customers to place orders through the site
